title: Fix button backgrounds and update version to 0.4.151

requirements.summary: Fix Upload Files, New Folder, and Upload Folder button backgrounds to use solid fills with neutral borders in both light and dark modes
acceptanceCriteria: Upload Files button renders with a filled #eff6ff background and no blue/colored border
New Folder button renders with a filled #fefce8 background and no yellow/colored border
Upload Folder button renders with a filled #fefce8 background and no yellow/colored border
Background fills are visible in both light and dark themes

file_operations.description: Update the three action buttons (Upload Files, New Folder, Upload Folder) at the top of the file manager to apply solid background colors (#eff6ff for Upload Files, #fefce8 for New Folder and Upload Folder) with neutral/default borders. Remove any colored border classes (border-blue-*, border-yellow-*) and replace with border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 or similar neutral border. Ensure the background colors persist in dark mode by using inline styles or custom CSS classes that override dark mode defaults. The buttons are rendered in the header section of the FileList component alongside the search bar and view mode toggle.
Change the APP_VERSION constant from its current value to the string '0.4.151'. This version will be displayed in the footer component.
